description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine vsc_dc_converter_data_3, and is implemented by a call to vsc_dc_converter_data_3. Use this API to modify the data of a dc converter of an existing VSC dc line in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Voltage Source Converter (VSC) DC Transmission Line Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = vsc_dc_converter_data(name, ic, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Vsc dc line name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ic
parameters.description: Dc converter index (1 or 2). (input; no default allowed).

intgar.description: IBUS, converter bus number (no default allowed).
TYPE, dc control code (1 by default).
MODE, ac control code (1 = voltage, 2 = power factor) (1 by default).
REMOT, remote bus number (0 for this converter to regulate voltage at bus IBUS) (0 by default).

realar.description: DCSET, dc setpoint (kV or MW) (1.0 by default).
ACSET, ac setpoint (pu voltage or power factor) (1.0 by default).
ALOSS, A loss coefficient (kW) (0.0 by default).
BLOSS, B loss coefficient (kW/amps) (0.0 by default).
MINLOS, minimum converter losses (kW) (0.0 by default).
SMAX, converter ac MVA rating (0.0 by default).
IMAX, converter ac current rating (amps) (0.0 by default).
PWF, power weighting factor fraction (1.0 by default).
MAXQ, reactive power upper limit (Mvar) (9999.0 by default).
MINQ, reactive power lower limit (Mvar) (-9999.0 by default).
RMPCT, percent of contributed reactive power (100.0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Converter bus is dummy bus of a multi-section line - Multi-section line grouping deleted. - Invalid dc control code - Invalid ac control mode - Regulated bus not found - Converter specified as remotely regulating itself. - Type code of regulated bus is not 1 or 2. - dc voltage setpoint is not positive - ac voltage setpoint is outside the band 0.75 to 1.25 pu - ac power factor setpoint is in error (magnitude exceeds 1.0) - Invalid power weighting factor fraction - MAXQ is less than MINQ. - RMPCT is not positive.
